lines.speaker: fu_xing
lines.text: Hi, guys. Sports Day is coming soon. We need to sign up for the tryouts by Friday. What do you think?

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: Well, the 100 metres is usually exciting and everybody is looking forward to the 4x100-metre relay. I could sign up for both. What about you, Binbin?

lines.speaker: binbin
lines.text: I don't know. Neither is really suitable for me. I might not take part.

lines.speaker: fu_xing
lines.text: But you like jogging. You could try the 1,500 metres.

lines.speaker: binbin
lines.text: Well, maybe. How about you, Fu Xing?

lines.speaker: fu_xing
lines.text: I like the high jump, so I will try that.

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: Good idea!

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: Hi, Teng Fei. Have we found anybody who can join our 4x100-metre relay?

lines.speaker: teng_fei
lines.text: Hi, Peter. I was just about to tell you. Han Lin will join us. But for the fourth member, either Wang Yaming or Adam is a possible choice.

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: So, who do you prefer?

lines.speaker: teng_fei
lines.text: Both are quite fast. But Adam seems quite busy already ... I'll go with Wang Yaming. And we need to start training soon!

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: No problem. The team looks great!

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: Everybody is so excited about Sports Day. What events are you taking part in, Meimei?

lines.speaker: meimei
lines.text: I'm really not much of an athlete.

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: Oh, that's OK.

lines.speaker: meimei
lines.text: Yes, no problem at all. Ms Gao made me the school photographer and reporter.

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: Cool! You can get a closer look at every event. What are you looking forward to the most?

lines.speaker: meimei
lines.text: Hmm, the 4x100-metre relay and the team pull-up competition.

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: Me too. The team pull-up competition sounds like so much fun.

lines.speaker: meimei
lines.text: Yes! I can't wait!

lines.speaker: meimei
lines.text: Hello, everyone! Finally here comes the exciting 4x100-metre relay! I'm Song Meimei.

lines.speaker: adam
lines.text: This is Adam. Welcome to the 4x100-metre relay.

lines.speaker: meimei
lines.text: Look. The runners are at the starting line. The race is about to start.

lines.speaker: adam
lines.text: They're off! Wang Yaming for Class 1 takes the lead.

lines.speaker: meimei
lines.text: He passes the baton to Peter. Peter keeps the lead. Now for the handoff to Han Lin.

lines.speaker: adam
lines.text: Oh, no! Peter drops the baton! Han Lin picks it up! But the other runners run past him.

lines.speaker: meimei
lines.text: Li Lei takes the lead now. Wait a minute! Han Lin is making up ground on Li Lei.

lines.speaker: adam
lines.text: Here comes the final handoff. Li Lei passes the baton to Xie Tao. Han Lin passes the baton to Teng Fei.

lines.speaker: meimei
lines.text: And here's Teng Fei and Xie Tao side by side! They cross the line together!

lines.speaker: adam
lines.text: But who won?

lines.speaker: meimei
lines.text: The judges are looking at the video to decide who the winner is. Let's wait for their final decision! Oh! The winner is Teng Fei!

lines.speaker: adam
lines.text: Congratulations to Class 1!
